# Soulism Crawl Snapshot

Date: 2026-03-11
Source: https://soulism.ai
Method: Playwright page load, full-page screenshot, accessibility snapshot, and reduced HTML crawl.

## Captured artifacts

- `homepage-full.png`: full-page screenshot captured from the live site.
- `homepage-accessibility-snapshot.yml`: Playwright accessibility tree snapshot.

## Public homepage section order observed

1. Hero
2. Announcement strip
3. Large testimonial wall
4. Quick start / install
5. Capability grid
6. Integration strip
7. Featured references / community / docs / source links

## Hero copy observed

- Brand: `Soulism`
- Primary statement: action-first personal assistant framing
- Supporting examples: inbox, email, calendar, flights
- Channel framing: WhatsApp, Telegram, and other chat apps

## Announcement strip observed

- Single featured update placed directly under the hero
- Current live example on crawl date: VirusTotal partnership / skill security

## Social proof section observed

- Heading: `What People Say`
- Layout pattern: dense wall of testimonial cards
- Dominant proof themes:
  - persistent memory
  - chat-native control
  - open-source ownership
  - autonomous or background execution
  - skill/plugin extensibility

## Quick start section observed

- Heading: `Quick Start`
- Entry paths:
  - one-line shell install
  - npm global install
  - hackable source install
  - companion app download

## Capability section observed

- Heading: `What It Does`
- Cards observed:
  - `Runs on Your Machine`
  - `Any Chat App`
  - `Persistent Memory`
  - `Browser Control`
  - `Full System Access`
  - `Skills & Plugins`

## Integration section observed

- Heading: `Works With Everything`
- Pattern: branded integration chips followed by links to deeper integration and build examples

## Final proof / navigation section observed

- Heading: `Featured In`
- Followed by links for community, documentation, and source

## How this is being used in Cognitive AI

- Mirror the section sequence and pacing, not the product claims.
- Replace testimonials with repo-backed proof and operator/runtime data.
- Keep docs and control-plane links as first-class public destinations.
- Apply the same strong black-first visual field while preserving Cognitive AI branding and governance posture.
